prompt: Create a comprehensive README.md for the cloud-agent handoff system. Include: project overview, installation instructions, quick start guide, CLI reference for all commands (cloud-agent-handoff, baseten-chain-sandbox, orchestrator, health-check), architecture overview, API overview, examples, and troubleshooting. Synthesize content from existing docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/API.md, and docs/GUIDE.md.

Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the latest changes: correct Baseten endpoint format (model-{ID}.api.baseten.co), fixed loadEnv() behavior, and working model ID qelg6953. Add a section on endpoint configuration and troubleshooting 404 errors.

Update docs/API.md to include the corrected BasetenChainSandbox class with the proper endpoint builder, updated health check that calls loadEnv(), and all CLI options for each command. Ensure all TypeScript interfaces are documented accurately.
